options.systemMessage:
You are a finance tracking assistant. You help the user log their income and expenses, track debts, manage wishlists, and monitor their investment portfolio.

CRITICAL TOOL INSTRUCTIONS:
- Log_Transaction: Log income or expense. Requires type ('income' or 'expense'), category, amount, vendor.
- Get_Analytics: Get transaction history for X days.
- Log_Debt: Track debts. RULE 1: Positive amount = they owe user money. RULE 2: Negative amount = user owes them money. RULE 3: If you are PAYING BACK a debt, you must log the MATHEMATICAL INVERSE of the balance! (e.g., if Get_Debts says balance is -1000, you must log +1000 to bring it to 0). ALWAYS call Get_Debts before and after Log_Debt to guarantee the math equals 0 when settled.
- Get_Debts: Gets total balances. If someone's total_owed is 0, the debt is FULLY SETTLED (they owe nothing). If they are not in the list, they owe nothing.
- Add_To_Wishlist: Track an item. Requires item_name, url, target_price.
- Trade_Stock: Buy or sell a stock. Requires type ('buy' or 'sell'), asset_symbol, shares, and price. This AUTOMATICALLY logs the transaction, calculates profit/loss, and updates the user's portfolio holdings!
- Get_Trade_History: Fetch the user's recent stock buy/sell transactions.
- Check_Portfolio: Get the user's investment portfolio. This returns real-time market prices and profit_loss. Present the current value, live price, and state if they are in profit or loss.
- Generate_PDF_Report: To generate a PDF. Use report_type 'custom' with 'title' and 'content'.

parameters.name: Log_Transaction
parameters.description: Log an income or expense. Requires type, category, amount, vendor.
parameters.jsCode: const response = await this.helpers.httpRequest({ method: 'POST', url: 'http://localhost:3000/api/finance/transaction', body: { chat_id: $('Execute Workflow Trigger').first().json.chat_id, type: query.type, category: query.category, amount: query.amount, vendor: query.vendor }, json: true }); return JSON.stringify(response);

parameters.name: Get_Analytics
parameters.jsCode: const response = await this.helpers.httpRequest({ method: 'GET', url: 'http://localhost:3000/api/finance/transaction', qs: { chat_id: $('Execute Workflow Trigger').first().json.chat_id, days: query.days || 30 }, json: true }); return JSON.stringify(response);

parameters.name: Log_Debt
parameters.description: Log a debt. person_name, amount_owed, description.
parameters.jsCode: const response = await this.helpers.httpRequest({ method: 'POST', url: 'http://localhost:3000/api/finance/debt', body: { chat_id: $('Execute Workflow Trigger').first().json.chat_id, person_name: query.person_name, amount_owed: query.amount_owed, description: query.description }, json: true }); return JSON.stringify(response);

parameters.name: Get_Debts
parameters.description: Get a list of everyone who owes money.
parameters.jsCode: const response = await this.helpers.httpRequest({ method: 'GET', url: 'http://localhost:3000/api/finance/debt', qs: { chat_id: $('Execute Workflow Trigger').first().json.chat_id }, json: true }); return JSON.stringify(response);

parameters.name: Add_To_Wishlist
parameters.description: Add an item to the wishlist monitor. item_name, url, target_price.
parameters.jsCode: const response = await this.helpers.httpRequest({ method: 'POST', url: 'http://localhost:3000/api/finance/wishlist', body: { chat_id: $('Execute Workflow Trigger').first().json.chat_id, item_name: query.item_name, url: query.url, target_price: query.target_price }, json: true }); return JSON.stringify(response);

parameters.name: Trade_Stock
parameters.description: Buy or sell a stock. type ('buy'/'sell'), asset_symbol, shares, price.
parameters.jsCode: const response = await this.helpers.httpRequest({ method: 'POST', url: 'http://localhost:3000/api/finance/trade', body: { chat_id: $('Execute Workflow Trigger').first().json.chat_id, type: query.type, asset_symbol: query.asset_symbol, shares: query.shares, price: query.price }, json: true }); return JSON.stringify(response);

parameters.name: Check_Portfolio
parameters.jsCode: const response = await this.helpers.httpRequest({ method: 'GET', url: 'http://localhost:3000/api/finance/portfolio', qs: { chat_id: $('Execute Workflow Trigger').first().json.chat_id }, json: true }); return JSON.stringify(response);

parameters.name: Generate_PDF_Report
parameters.description: Generate a PDF report. report_type='custom', title, content.
parameters.jsCode: const body = { chat_id: $('Execute Workflow Trigger').first().json.chat_id, report_type: query.report_type }; if (query.title) body.title = query.title; if (query.content) body.content = query.content; const response = await this.helpers.httpRequest({ method: 'POST', url: 'http://localhost:3000/api/pdf', body: body, json: true }); return JSON.stringify(response);

parameters.name: Get_Trade_History
parameters.description: Get stock trade history. Optional limit.
parameters.jsCode: const response = await this.helpers.httpRequest({ method: 'GET', url: 'http://localhost:3000/api/finance/trade', qs: { chat_id: $('Execute Workflow Trigger').first().json.chat_id, limit: query.limit || 10 }, json: true }); return JSON.stringify(response);
